title: CULINARY JOB TRAINING PROGRAM - 211info
text: STONE SOUP NE CULINARY JOB TRAINING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 12-week training program to assist individuals who want to work in the the food and hospitality industries. The program gives each participant hands-on training to prepare them for employment. Program participants receive a stipend. This program operates on a waitlist. 7400 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Must meet all of the following requirements: -Age 18 and older with a focus on those with housing insecurity and barriers to employment -Currently housed. Individuals currently in shelters or transitional housing are considered as being housed for purposes of this program. -Possess basic reading and writing comprehension in English language -Must not be a registered sex offender Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 719-4772 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 719-4772 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Multnomah and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Corner of NE 74th & Glisan Street on TriMet bus lines 19, 20 & 15 Services: Job Development Job Training Formats If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. STONE SOUP NE
